title: lycianthes dejecta
intro: Lycianthes dejecta, also known as the Chilean nightshade or Chilean potato tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits also include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Lycianthes dejecta is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
